# Scenario: stuck in-flight state prevents idle refresh
#
# Reproduces the bug where `opencode-chat--refresh-state' gets stuck
# in `in-flight' (e.g. from a lost HTTP callback), preventing the
# canonical session.idle refresh from ever running.
#
# The session stays busy for TWO consecutive assistant messages (the
# first finishes with tool-calls, the second with stop) — exactly
# like the real bug.  No idle fires between them.  The only idle is
# at the very end, after both messages complete.
#
# The API mock returns the final server state including a user message
# ("commit and push") that was never streamed.  The second assistant
# message has text "second response done" in the mock, but only
# "second response" was streamed (no " done").  Asserting
# "second response done" proves the idle refresh ran.

:session ses_stuck_guard
:directory /tmp/test-project

# ── API mocks (final server state) ──
:api GET /session/ses_stuck_guard/message 200 [{"info":{"id":"msg_user1","sessionID":"ses_stuck_guard","role":"user","time":{"created":500000}},"parts":[{"id":"prt_u1","sessionID":"ses_stuck_guard","messageID":"msg_user1","type":"text","text":"commit and push","time":{"start":500000,"end":500001}}]},{"info":{"id":"msg_asst1","sessionID":"ses_stuck_guard","role":"assistant","time":{"created":1000000},"modelID":"test-model","agent":"test-agent","finish":"tool-calls","tokens":{"input":10,"output":5,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}},"parts":[{"id":"prt_text1","sessionID":"ses_stuck_guard","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"text","text":"first response","time":{"start":1000001,"end":1000002}}]},{"info":{"id":"msg_asst2","sessionID":"ses_stuck_guard","role":"assistant","time":{"created":2000000},"modelID":"test-model","agent":"test-agent","finish":"stop","tokens":{"input":20,"output":10,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}},"parts":[{"id":"prt_text2","sessionID":"ses_stuck_guard","messageID":"msg_asst2","type":"text","text":"second response done","time":{"start":2000001,"end":2000002}}]}]

:api GET /session/ses_stuck_guard 200 {"id":"ses_stuck_guard","slug":"test","projectID":"proj1","directory":"/tmp/test-project","title":"Test Session","version":"1.0.0","time":{"created":500000,"updated":2000002}}

:api GET /session/ses_stuck_guard/todo 200 []
:api GET /session/ses_stuck_guard/diff 200 []

# ── Session becomes busy (stays busy for both messages) ──

:sse {"type":"session.status","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_stuck_guard","status":{"type":"busy"}}}
:assert-busy

# ── First assistant message (finishes with tool-calls, no idle) ──

:sse {"type":"message.updated","properties":{"info":{"id":"msg_asst1","sessionID":"ses_stuck_guard","role":"assistant","time":{"created":1000000},"modelID":"test-model","agent":"test-agent","tokens":{"input":10,"output":5,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}}}}
:sse {"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_step1_start","sessionID":"ses_stuck_guard","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"step-start","snapshot":"abc123"}}}
:sse {"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_text1","sessionID":"ses_stuck_guard","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"text","text":"","time":{"start":1000001}}}}
:sse {"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_text1","sessionID":"ses_stuck_guard","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"text","text":"first response","time":{"start":1000001}},"delta":"first response"}}
:assert-contains first response
:sse {"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_text1","sessionID":"ses_stuck_guard","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"text","text":"first response","time":{"start":1000001,"end":1000002}}}}
:sse {"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_step1_finish","sessionID":"ses_stuck_guard","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"step-finish","reason":"tool-calls","tokens":{"total":100,"input":10,"output":5,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}}}}

# First message done (tool-calls) — server stays busy, starts second message

# message.updated with completed time signals first message is done
:sse {"type":"message.updated","properties":{"info":{"id":"msg_asst1","sessionID":"ses_stuck_guard","role":"assistant","time":{"created":1000000,"completed":1000003},"modelID":"test-model","agent":"test-agent","finish":"tool-calls","tokens":{"input":10,"output":5,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}}}}

# session.status stays busy (no idle between messages)
:sse {"type":"session.status","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_stuck_guard","status":{"type":"busy"}}}
:assert-busy

# ── Second assistant message (new message, same session) ──

:sse {"type":"message.updated","properties":{"info":{"id":"msg_asst2","sessionID":"ses_stuck_guard","role":"assistant","time":{"created":2000000},"modelID":"test-model","agent":"test-agent","tokens":{"input":20,"output":10,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}}}}
:sse {"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_step2_start","sessionID":"ses_stuck_guard","messageID":"msg_asst2","type":"step-start","snapshot":"def456"}}}
:sse {"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_text2","sessionID":"ses_stuck_guard","messageID":"msg_asst2","type":"text","text":"","time":{"start":2000001}}}}

# Stream "second response" — note: NO " done" suffix (that's only in the API mock)
:sse {"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_text2","sessionID":"ses_stuck_guard","messageID":"msg_asst2","type":"text","text":"second response","time":{"start":2000001}},"delta":"second response"}}
:assert-contains second response

:sse {"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_text2","sessionID":"ses_stuck_guard","messageID":"msg_asst2","type":"text","text":"second response","time":{"start":2000001,"end":2000002}}}}
:sse {"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_step2_finish","sessionID":"ses_stuck_guard","messageID":"msg_asst2","type":"step-finish","reason":"stop","tokens":{"total":200,"input":20,"output":10,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}}}}

# Second message done
:sse {"type":"message.updated","properties":{"info":{"id":"msg_asst2","sessionID":"ses_stuck_guard","role":"assistant","time":{"created":2000000,"completed":2000003},"modelID":"test-model","agent":"test-agent","finish":"stop","tokens":{"input":20,"output":10,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}}}}

# ── Simulate stuck in-flight state ──
# In production this happens when an API callback is lost due to
# network timeout, server restart, or race condition.
:eval (opencode-chat--set-refresh-state 'in-flight)

# ── Session finally goes idle (the ONLY idle in this session) ──
# Without the fix: refresh blocked by stuck guard → buffer stuck with
#   streamed content only ("second response", no user message)
# With the fix: guard force-cleared → refresh runs → buffer shows full
#   API data including "second response done" and "commit and push"
:sse {"type":"session.status","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_stuck_guard","status":{"type":"idle"}}}
:sse {"type":"session.idle","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_stuck_guard"}}
:assert-idle

# ── Key assertions ──
# "second response done" is ONLY in the API mock (streamed: "second response")
:assert-contains second response done

# User message is never streamed — only appears after refresh
:assert-contains commit and push
